title: Batman Lunch Bag for Kids, 24 x 8 x 24 cm, Insulated Lunch Bag with Handle and Zip | Lightweight and Easy to Carry | Gift for Batman Fans
features: HOX Batman lunch bag is made of high-quality food-safe materials, handle, zip and pocket. The Batman lunch box is ideal for carrying variety of food or snacks to school, picnics.
Perfect for fans of the superhero Batman – a brilliant tactician and genius who is master of virtually every form of martial arts!
The Food-safe PEVA insulation of Batman lunch bag keeps food fresh and flavourful for longer, ideal for school lunches and outings. Combines practicality with fun and imagination.
The Batman lunch box for kids is made from high-quality, durable polyester for long-lasting use and easy cleaning. Interior and exterior can be wiped down quickly for hassle-free maintenance.
The Batman packed lunch box is lightweight and easy for kids to carry, yet large enough to hold a fulfilling meal, a refreshing drink, and snacks.
description: From the manufacturer 3D Torso Front Panel Bringing some muscle to lunchtime - This unique lunchbag features a moulded torso shape on the front panel. Insulated and Wipe Clean Fully lined with food-safe insulation materials, the lunchbag keeps its contents fresh all the way to lunch time. Keeping food cool throughout the day for school or picnics. Always Yours Convenient name tag on the reverse allows for your childs name to be written or labelled in case it's left behind.
